top.name: Avatar of Elements
top.rules_text: Transform for 3 turns: gain 7 armor, spells deal +3 damage and imbue target with random element. Leave elemental trails when moving.

bottom.name: Maelstrom
bottom.rules_text: Create a storm zone (radius 3). Each turn deals 5 damage, pushes clockwise, imbues with Storm. Lasts 3 turns.

upgrades.description: Avatar lasts longer and grants more armor. Maelstrom hits harder.

changes.value: Transform for 3 turns: gain 9 armor, spells deal +4 damage and imbue target with random element.
Create storm zone (radius 3). Each turn deals 7 damage, pushes clockwise, imbues with Storm. Lasts 3 turns.

upgrades.description: Elemental Sovereign: While Avatar is active, your attunement counters don't decay. The transformation sustains your elemental mastery.

changes.value: Transform for 4 turns: gain 10 armor, spells deal +4 damage and imbue target. Attunement doesn't decay.

upgrades.description: Storm Veil: Maelstrom now also imbues adjacent tiles with storm each turn. The storm spreads beyond its origin.

changes.value: Create storm zone (radius 4). Each turn deals 7 damage, pushes clockwise, imbues tiles with Storm. Lasts 3 turns.

upgrades.description: Transcendence: Avatar now also boosts your spell range by 2. Elemental sovereignty extends your reach.

changes.value: Transform for 4 turns: gain 11 armor, +5 spell damage, +1 speed. Imbue each target with random element.

upgrades.description: Eye of the Maelstrom: Maelstrom now also freezes enemies at the end of each turn tick. The maelstrom locks enemies in place.

changes.value: Create storm zone (radius 4). Each turn deals 8 damage, pushes, freezes, imbues Storm. Lasts 4 turns.

upgrades.description: God of Elements: Avatar transformation now triggers a burst of all four elements when it expires — a final eruption.

changes.value: Transform for 5 turns: gain 12 armor, +6 spell damage, +2 speed. On expiry, burst all 4 attunement elements.

upgrades.description: World Storm: Two Maelstroms can now exist simultaneously. Place one and the other persists from before.

changes.value: Create storm zone (radius 5). Each turn deals 9 damage, pushes, freezes, imbues Storm. Lasts 5 turns.
